name: cctokens
description: Claude Code context-waste diagnostics. Scans JSONL transcripts and reports token usage and waste patterns.
author: Drew McGee

commands.name: cctokens
commands.description: Run cctokens diagnostics for the current project

commands.name: cctokens-doctor
commands.description: Run cctokens doctor --last and summarise top findings

agents.name: context-waste-reviewer
agents.description: Diagnoses Claude Code context waste using cctokens
